subcodes.first_line: God, exalted be He, hath spoken: "And hold ye fast, all together, by the cord of God." Know ye, O beloved of God and His chosen ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قال الله تعالی و اعتصموا بحبل الله جمیعا اعلموا یا احباء الله و اصفیائه و
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @unity of thought and belief, @firmness in the Covenant, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
